subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad, upon thee be My glory! This Wronged One testifieth to thy devotion and attraction, thy humility and submissiveness before God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک بهائی اینمظلوم شهادت میدهد بر توجه و اقبال و خضوع و خشوع تو لله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @exhortations and counsels
